meaning: adv.理想地,在观念上地,完美地
examples: Ideally, she would love to become pregnant again.
Ideally, I'd like to live in New York, but that's not possible.
People should, ideally, be persuaded to eat a diet with much less fat or oil.
Ideally, also, each modeler will bring a different set of biases and expectations into the mix.
We have 100 percent control (ideally) over what comes out of our own mouth.
